channel.title: itch.io Charity Bundles — Opportunities
channel.description: Auto-collected posts and jams related to charity/fundraisers on itch.io (fresh-only).

item.title: [JAMS] itch.io
item.description: SuNoFes 2026 Hosted by Alte Â· #sunofes 0 Joined Overview Submissions open from 2026-07-01 12:00:00 to 2026-09-02 21:00:00 Starts in years months days hours minutes seconds Join jam An online game jam focused on visual novels and story-based games. Starts July 1st, ends August 31
